name: GaugeFlow H1 harmonic-conditioning operator qualification v1
purpose: Qualify new mathematical operators before any replacement conditional-control gate is proposed.

methods.alignment: harmonic_alignment_v1 with deterministic Hopf-coordinate SO(3) quasi-Monte-Carlo grids
methods.early_condition: low-order proper-SO(3) invariant token plus entropy/time-gated aligned token
methods.parity: separate 0e/0o/1o/1e prototype; not yet a trained crystal backbone

forbidden: Do not label an operator test as a Gate A pass.
Do not train on the eight-ID or full TensorOrbit-JARVIS panel under this protocol.
Do not replace v1 results, checkpoints, reports, or thresholds.
Do not start relaxation, DFT, DFPT, Q1, S2, or tensor-oracle training.
next_authorized_decision: After numerical grid/reflection/assignment audits, write a separately versioned causal conditional-control protocol with frozen data, seeds, budget, grid, and success criteria.
